/usr/bin/ar qc libgao_base.a CMakeFiles/gao_base.dir/src/common/filters/ekf.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gao_base.dir/src/common/filters/lowpass.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gao_base.dir/src/common/license_utils.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gao_base.dir/src/common/math/matrix3.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gao_base.dir/src/common/math/quat.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gao_base.dir/src/common/math/vec3.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gao_base.dir/src/common/morphology/MorphologyRegistry.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gao_base.dir/src/common/watermark.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gao_base.dir/src/control/lqr_controller.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gao_base.dir/src/control/mpc_base.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gao_base.dir/src/control/pid_controller.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gao_base.dir/src/cross_domain/CompositeMorphologyManager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gao_base.dir/src/cross_domain/DomainDiscovery.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gao_base.dir/src/digital_twin/DigitalTwinSync.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gao_base.dir/src/intelligence/world_model_light.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gao_base.dir/src/safety/TripleRedundancyArbitrator.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gao_base.dir/src/safety/behavior_tree_executor.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gao_base.dir/src/safety/geofence.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gao_base.dir/src/safety/safety_island.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gao_base.dir/src/scenario/scene_manager.cpp.o
/usr/bin/ranlib libgao_base.a
